name: Infallible Procession
description: Each time Dahlia gains 1 of his Elemental Burst Radiant Psalter's Benison stacks, he will regain 2.5 Elemental Energy.

name: Revelation of Mercy
description: After Dahlia consumes his Elemental Burst Radiant Psalter's Benison stacks to summon a Shield of Sacred Favor, the character protected by said Shield will gain 25% increased Shield Strength for 12s.

name: Windblume Offertory
description:
Increases the Level of Radiant Psalter by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.

name: Collect of the Assembly
description: The Favonian Favor from Dahlia's Elemental Burst Radiant Psalter lasts 3 more seconds.

name: Let It Be Subtly So
description:
Increases the Level of Immersive Ordinance by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.

name: You Shall Go Out With Joy
description:
The current active character affected by the Elemental Burst Radiant Psalter's Favonian Favor has their ATK SPD increased by 10%.
Additionally, when an active character affected by Favonian Favor falls, immediately:
· Revive them.
· Restore their HP to 100%.
This effect can trigger once every 15 minutes.
